hardChecks: Toilet count must match requirement or explain compromise.
Kitchen must exist for residential plan.
If parking is requested, parking zone must exist.
If staircase is requested, staircase zone must exist.
Every room must have name, approximate size, position, and access.
Image prompt must explicitly say top-view 2D floor plan for floor plan requests.
Negative prompt must reject 3D/perspective render for floor plan requests.
softChecks: Common toilet should be accessible without entering bedroom.
Windows should be placed on exterior walls where possible.
Vastu preferences should be applied when practical.
